pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility checks.

src/main/java/com/students/studentProfil.general_idea: Exclude Spring Data Web auto-configuration to resolve a conflict or unwanted behavior with the custom JDBC integration.
src/main/java/com/students/studentProfil.why_exists: Without this exclusion, Spring Boot's default Spring Data Web auto-configuration may interfere with the custom JDBC setup or cause runtime conflicts regarding pageables/sorters, leading to application startup failure or incorrect behavior.
